title: hedyotis retrorsa
intro: Hedyotis retrorsa, also known as the Chinese chrysanthemum or Asian chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, Hedyotis retrorsa is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and promoting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Hedyotis retrorsa is often used in teas, infusions, or combined with other herbs in formulas to support respiratory and immune system health.
